items.title: Solana Foundation to Help Secure DeFi Protocols Following $285 Million Drift Hack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Solana Foundation's initiative to secure DeFi protocols could enhance trust and stability in the ecosystem, potentially attracting more users and liquidity.

items.title: All about Solana’s liquidity situation after recent exploits – Where is the capital going?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Understanding Solana's liquidity shifts post-exploits is crucial for assessing capital flow and overall market confidence in the platform's resilience.

items.title: Solana-based Stabble tells LPs to withdraw funds after identifying former North Korean employee
items.whyYouShouldCare: Stabble's warning to LPs about a former North Korean employee raises concerns about security and governance, which could impact investor confidence in Solana-based projects.
